  "weights": {

    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",

    "RX.3",

  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "“Clean this up” most plausibly requests sentence- and paragraph-level polishing for clarity, concision, and readability without changing high-level structure or claims.",
    "RX.1": "Acknowledge ambiguity in the scope of 'cleanup' and avoid implying changes beyond stylistic editing.",
    "RX.2": "Ensure no new or stronger technical claims are introduced during editing and that existing claims are not overstated.",
    "RX.3": "Strictly confine the work to writing polish rather than conceptual reframing, restructuring, or methodological critique.",
    "RX.4": "Avoid edits that could mislead readers about capabilities, safety, or deployment requirements of the method.",
    "RX.5": "Preserve original technical content and terminology so the edited text remains traceable to the provided artifact."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: “Clean this up” most plausibly requests sentence- and paragraph-level polishing for clarity, concision, and readability without changing high-level structure or claims.
rationale.RX.1: Acknowledge ambiguity in the scope of 'cleanup' and avoid implying changes beyond stylistic editing.
rationale.RX.2: Ensure no new or stronger technical claims are introduced during editing and that existing claims are not overstated.
rationale.RX.3: Strictly confine the work to writing polish rather than conceptual reframing, restructuring, or methodological critique.
rationale.RX.4: Avoid edits that could mislead readers about capabilities, safety, or deployment requirements of the method.
rationale.RX.5: Preserve original technical content and terminology so the edited text remains traceable to the provided artifact.
